context: Tests whether the agent correctly sets up the autoreview helper environment variables, picks the right review mode for three distinct code-state scenarios, uses the Codex default engine without adding unrequested overrides, and avoids panel/multi-reviewer flags when not requested.

checklist.name: AUTOREVIEW variable set
checklist.description: Script sets AUTOREVIEW to a path under $AGENTS_HOME (or $HOME/.agents or $HOME/.claude) — not a hardcoded absolute path

checklist.name: AUTOREVIEW_HARNESS variable set
checklist.description: Script sets AUTOREVIEW_HARNESS (using $AGENTS_HOME, $HOME/.agents, or $HOME/.claude as base) — not a hardcoded path

checklist.name: AGENTS_HOME for global skill
checklist.description: Script sets or references AGENTS_HOME — either as $HOME/.agents or $HOME/.claude — when setting up the global skill path

checklist.name: $AUTOREVIEW invocation used
checklist.description: All three helper invocations use "$AUTOREVIEW" (the variable), not a hardcoded script path

checklist.name: Local mode for uncommitted changes
checklist.description: The scenario covering unstaged/staged/uncommitted changes uses --mode local (or --mode uncommitted) — not --mode branch or --mode commit

checklist.name: Branch mode for PR/feature branch
checklist.description: The scenario covering the open pull request / feature branch uses --mode branch

checklist.name: Branch mode has --base flag
checklist.description: The --mode branch invocation includes a --base flag (e.g. --base origin/main or base from gh pr view)

checklist.name: Commit mode for pushed-to-main
checklist.description: The scenario covering already-pushed work on main uses --mode commit

checklist.name: No --engine claude override
checklist.description: The script does NOT add --engine claude (or --reviewers claude) on any invocation — Codex default is used implicitly

checklist.name: No panel flags
checklist.description: The script does NOT include --panel or --reviewers flags on any invocation (panels were not requested)
